_comment: PoE Bestiary crafting recipes. Beast names match in-game Einhar capture names.

recipes.result: Adds Aspect of the Cat skill to item
recipes.notes: Adds Aspect of the Cat to any non-unique, non-corrupted item with an open suffix slot

recipes.result: Adds Aspect of the Spider skill to item
recipes.notes: Adds Aspect of the Spider to any non-unique, non-corrupted item with an open suffix slot

recipes.result: Adds Aspect of the Avian skill to item
recipes.notes: Adds Aspect of the Avian to any non-unique, non-corrupted item with an open suffix slot

recipes.result: Adds Aspect of the Crab skill to item
recipes.notes: Adds Aspect of the Crab to any non-unique, non-corrupted item with an open suffix slot

recipes.result: Creates two copies of a corrupted item with each modifier randomly distributed
recipes.notes: Splits a corrupted item into two items. Each explicit modifier randomly goes to one copy. Very rare — requires 4 beasts.

recipes.result: Creates an imprint of a magic item for one-time restoration
recipes.notes: Only works on magic (blue) items. Restore the imprint to undo any crafting done since the imprint was made.

recipes.result: Removes a random prefix from the target item
recipes.notes: Targets rare items. Cannot be used on items with only one modifier.

recipes.result: Removes a random suffix from the target item
recipes.notes: Targets rare items. Cannot be used on items with only one modifier.

recipes.result: Adds a random prefix to the target item
recipes.notes: Targets rare items. Item must have an open prefix slot.

recipes.result: Adds a random suffix to the target item
recipes.notes: Targets rare items. Item must have an open suffix slot.

recipes.result: Removes a random prefix and adds a random new prefix
recipes.notes: Equivalent to a targeted annul + exalt for prefixes. Very efficient for crafting.

recipes.result: Removes a random suffix and adds a random new suffix
recipes.notes: Equivalent to a targeted annul + exalt for suffixes.

recipes.result: Removes a random prefix and adds a random suffix
recipes.notes: Useful for converting prefixes to suffixes on items with no open suffix slots.

recipes.result: Removes a random suffix and adds a random prefix
recipes.notes: Useful for converting suffixes to prefixes on items with no open prefix slots.

recipes.result: Rerolls a magic item's modifiers (like Orb of Alteration)
recipes.notes: Only works on magic (blue) items.

recipes.result: Corrupts a skill gem and sets quality to 23%
recipes.notes: Result is 23% quality gem (corrupted). No other corruption effect applies.

recipes.modifier: Add Quality to a Flaskwith Bonus
recipes.result: Adds 1% quality to a flask (up to 30%)
recipes.notes: Raises quality of the target flask by 1 quality. Works up to 30% unlike Glassblower's Bauble cap.

recipes.result: Adds a white socket to an item (replaces a random colored socket)
recipes.notes: White sockets accept any gem color. Very valuable for off-color socket needs.

recipes.modifier: Change Socket Colors to Match Class Requirements
recipes.result: Sets the socket colors to match the strength/dex/int attribute requirements of the item
recipes.notes: Converts all sockets to the dominant attribute color of the item's requirements.

recipes.result: Applies a random Labyrinth enchantment to a helmet
recipes.notes: Applies a random Merciless Lab–tier enchantment (like Uber Lab running but random). Can override existing enchant.

recipes.modifier: Upgrade a Map to a Higher Tier
recipes.result: Upgrades a map by one tier
recipes.notes: Upgrades a map by 1 tier. Useful for upgrading abundant low-tier maps.

recipes.modifier: Add Quantity and Rarity to a Map
recipes.result: Adds increased item quantity/rarity mods to a magic map
recipes.notes: Targets magic maps only. Adds or rerolls quantity/rarity modifiers.

recipes.modifier: Change Flask Life Recovery to Hybrid
recipes.result: Converts a life flask to a hybrid (life + mana) flask
recipes.notes: Only works on life flasks.

recipes.result: Consumes a silver coin to trigger a random sealed prophecy
recipes.notes: Legacy content — Prophecy was removed in PoE 3.17. Only available on standard/legacy leagues.

recipes.result: Corrupts a unique item, potentially adding a veiled mod or changing values
recipes.notes: Corrupts the unique item and applies a random corruption effect (like Vaal Orb). Can brick the item.
